draft_recipe.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
draft_recipe.description: A rich and creamy Indian curry with tender grilled chicken in a spiced tomato sauce.

recipeInstructions.text: Mix yogurt, lemon juice, and spices in a bowl.
Add chicken and marinate for at least 1 hour.
Grill or broil chicken until cooked through.
Saute onion in butter until golden.
Add garlic and ginger, cook 2 minutes.
Stir in cream and add grilled chicken.
Simmer 10 minutes and serve over rice.
